hero.title: The online estimator for vacation rental professionals
hero.subtitle: Give your property owners an instant, accurate estimate of their potential revenue — and convert more management mandates.

features.title: Why choose Estimate Rentals?
features.feature1Desc: Our algorithm analyzes real local market data to deliver reliable estimates, including seasonal variations.
features.feature2Desc: Copy two lines of code and our widget is live on your site — no technical skills required.
features.feature3Desc: Reach your international clients in their language, with estimates tailored to each local market.

estimate.title: Estimate your revenue
estimate.subtitle: Get a free and instant estimate of your potential rental income.

install.title: Integrate the estimator on your site
install.subtitle: Two steps are enough to add our widget to your site and start capturing qualified owner leads.
install.step3Desc: Replace YOUR_ID with your agency identifier and adjust the colors to match your branding.

about.title: Who are we?
about.intro: Estimate.rentals is a brand of Popconnect, based in Biarritz in the Basque Country. It brings together a team of enthusiasts: data experts, real estate professionals, and developers.
about.mission: Help vacation rental professionals convert more property owners with reliable, instant estimates.
about.vision: Become the reference tool for seasonal rental revenue estimation in Europe.
about.value1Desc: Our algorithms rely on real market data — not national averages — for each destination.
about.value2Desc: Each estimate is calculated with explicit criteria: area, location, seasonality, average occupancy rate.
about.value3Desc: One widget, two lines of code, zero friction. You're up and running in under 5 minutes.
about.value4Desc: Opportunity score, CRM/PMS integration, public API — we build tomorrow's tools for today's professionals.
